subject: IFS application 10210100: Project Impact numeric answers not persisting after finance update
body:
Hello Innovate UK support,

Please advise on IFS application 10210100, UK-Switzerland CR&D Round 3. The application finances have now been corrected and read back as complete in IFS, but the Project Impact survey still does not persist numeric answers.

Current IFS finance read-back:
- Total costs: GBP 216,194
- Funding level: 70%
- Funding sought: GBP 151,336
- Company contribution: GBP 64,858
- Other public sector funding: GBP 0

Current Project Impact issue:
- The survey field Number of Full Time Equivalent (FTE) employees accepts the value 1 on the question page.
- After selecting Continue, the review page still shows that numeric answer as blank.
- The same blank-review behaviour affects the numeric Project Impact fields.
- We have not pressed the Project Impact Submit button while the review page shows blank numeric values.

Please either reset the Project Impact survey state for application 10210100, confirm whether there is a known issue with numeric answers in this survey, or advise the correct route for completing the Project Impact section.

Regards,
Gary Leckey
R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd
Company number NI696693

subject: Aureon Evidence OS - OpenOcean pitch route submission
body:
Hi OpenOcean team,

Thank you again for the steer on the right pitch route.

I have prepared the concise Aureon Evidence OS deck and key data points for review. The deck frames the company as local-first AI workflow software for evidence-heavy business operations, with the first wedge in grant, diligence, compliance and accounting evidence workflows.

Attached for review:
- AUREON_OPENOCEAN_PITCH_DECK_20260712_001500.pdf
- OPENOCEAN_PITCH_KEY_DATA_20260712_20260712_071906.md

The package deliberately excludes confidential account records, credential material and source transaction records. It also avoids unsupported traction or partner-commitment claims.

Best regards,
Gary Leckey
R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd

subject: Shared Island Cluster-to-Cluster: Aureon Evidence OS partner eligibility clarification
body:
Dear Shared Island Clusters team,

I am writing on behalf of R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd, a Northern Ireland company developing Aureon Evidence OS, to ask for clarification on the Shared Island Cluster-to-Cluster Project Development Fund before the 17 July 2026 deadline.

We are assessing whether Aureon can support a cross-border cluster project as a Northern Ireland digital evidence and open-source AI workflow partner. The attached brief summarises the proposed role and the eligibility questions we need to resolve before any formal application.

Could you advise whether this type of SME technology partner role can fit the fund, what qualifies as an eligible cluster on each side of the border, and whether you can signpost potential Republic of Ireland cluster partners for an evidence, digital assurance or innovation-readiness project?

Regards,
Gary Leckey
R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd
gaxlec@gmail.com

Prepared by Aureon: 2026-07-12T12:08:45+01:00
